title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 211.025 - Judge may direct any case be heard by commissioner (counties of the first class and St. Louis City)
text:
211.025.  Judge may direct any case be heard by commissioner (counties of the first class and St. Louis City). — The judge of the juvenile court may direct that any case shall be heard in the first instance by a commissioner in the manner provided for the hearing of cases by the court.
(L. 1967 p. 332 § 2, A.L. 1980 S.B. 512)
